current_task.scope: Make README.md the Korean default, add an English README mirror, and document the setup doctor / one-command install behavior with language links.
current_task.verification_target: doc drift, campaign budget, markdown link sanity, package dry-run surface

orchestration_profile.efficiency_basis: The work is a tightly coupled README language split and package doc surface update; delegation would add translation drift.
orchestration_profile.selection_reason: The user wants Korean as the default README language with English/Korean navigation and current install-doctor behavior documented.

contract_freeze: README.md should become the Korean default entrypoint.
README.en.md should preserve the English public README content.
Both files should expose language navigation links near the top.
The changed install behavior must be visible: npx selfdex install installs the local plugin and runs selfdex doctor; account-bound integrations are reported, not silently installed.
No runtime, installer, or package version behavior should change.

reviewer.reviewer_target: setup doctor diff after local verification if risk remains
reviewer.reviewer_focus: installer safety, external plugin boundary, public CLI UX
reviewer.reviewer_result: No separate reviewer lane needed for a focused documentation language split.

last_update.status: Bilingual README update verified and recorded.
verification_result: git diff --check: pass with line-ending warnings only
rg language/install/doctor links in README.md README.en.md: pass
npm.cmd --cache C:/tmp/npm-cache-selfdex pack --dry-run --json: pass after sandbox escalation, README.en.md included

retrospective.orchestration_fit: single-session selected because README.md and README.en.md must stay wording-aligned.
retrospective.rework_or_reclassification: new user request after setup doctor completion
retrospective.next_gate_adjustment: Default public documentation should remain Korean while preserving English access.
